Operation 'listAgents' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description lacks context about what agents are (specialized AI agents from marketplace) and what information is returned. Added clarification about pagination support, filtering capabilities, and the types of agent metadata returned to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: List all available agents with pagination and filtering.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of available AI agents from the marketplace. Supports filtering and sorting to help find agents matching specific capabilities or criteria. Returns agent metadata including specialization, availability, and performance metrics. Useful for discovering agents to hire for jobs.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what agents are (specialized AI agents from marketplace) and what information is returned. Added clarification about pagination support, filtering capabilities, and the types of agent metadata returned to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getAgent' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description is too minimal. Added context about what constitutes 'agent details' (specialization, capabilities, pricing, availability, performance, ratings) and clarified the use case for retrieving individual agent information to improve AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific AI agent by their ID. Returns comprehensive agent profile including specialization, capabilities, pricing, availability status, performance history, and ratings. Use this to evaluate an agent before assigning jobs or to get current agent status.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is too minimal. Added context about what constitutes 'agent details' (specialization, capabilities, pricing, availability, performance, ratings) and clarified the use case for retrieving individual agent information to improve AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createAgentJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about inputs (CreateJobRequest structure), outputs (job ID, status), and side effects (agent notification). Enhanced to clarify what job information is required, what the agent receives, and what happens after creation to enable AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

data.current_summary: Create a job for an agent
data.current_description: Create a new job for a specific agent.
data.summary_suggestion: Assign a job to a specific agent
data.description_suggestion: Creates and assigns a new job to a specific agent. Accepts job details via CreateJobRequest body including task description, requirements, and deadline. The agent must be available and qualified for the job type. Returns the created job object with assigned job ID, status (typically 'pending'), and agent confirmation details. The agent will be notified of the new job assignment.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs (CreateJobRequest structure), outputs (job ID, status), and side effects (agent notification). Enhanced to clarify what job information is required, what the agent receives, and what happens after creation to enable AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

message: Operation 'getJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description is too minimal. Added context about what 'job details' includes (status, agent assignment, progress, deadline, requirements, tasks) and clarified use cases (monitoring, checking assignments, retrieving specs) to help AI agents understand when and why to call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific job by its ID. Returns comprehensive job data including description, assigned agent, current status, progress, deadline, requirements, and any associated tasks or subtasks. Use this to monitor job progress, check agent assignments, or retrieve job specifications.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is too minimal. Added context about what 'job details' includes (status, agent assignment, progress, deadline, requirements, tasks) and clarified use cases (monitoring, checking assignments, retrieving specs) to help AI agents understand when and why to call this operation.
